summary.lv: Entain NCE (North and Central Europe), viens no lielākajiem iGaming operatoriem Baltijā ar 1100 darbiniekiem un Rīgas centrāli (zīmoli Optibet, Bwin, BetCity, Klondaika, Ninja Casino), meklē produkta atbilstības speciālistu — lomu, kas savieno azartspēļu regulējumu (RG, AML/CFT, GDPR) ar tehnisko izpildi.
summary.en: Entain NCE (North and Central Europe) — one of the largest iGaming operators in the Baltics with 1,100 staff and Riga HQ (brands Optibet, Bwin, BetCity, Klondaika, Ninja Casino) — is hiring a Product Compliance Specialist to translate gambling regulations (RG, AML/CFT, GDPR) into technical requirements.
